title: Lemonade (NYSE:LMND) - Stock Analysis
text: Lemonade NYSE:LMND comprehensive stock analysis. Company profile: digital insurance company offering renters, homeowners, auto, pet, life, and landlord insurance across U.S., Europe, U.K. markets. Current valuation: price-to-sales 8.7x vs industry average 1.1x, indicating premium valuation. Analyst consensus: Hold rating, mixed sentiment on growth vs profitability. Price targets: average $64-66 per share with range $33-$92. Financial trajectory: consistent revenue growth, improving loss ratios, path to profitability emerging. Key metrics Q1 2026: revenue $258M (+71% YoY), in-force premium $1.33B (+32%), net loss $36M improving. Growth drivers: pet insurance largest segment, auto insurance expansion accelerating, autonomous vehicle insurance partnership with Tesla. Risk factors: regulatory risks across multiple states, catastrophic losses (wildfires), execution risk on profitability timeline, competitive threats from traditional insurers. Strengths: AI-driven underwriting improving loss ratios, customer acquisition efficiency, multi-product diversification, data advantages from Tesla partnership.
